title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · Agent Operations Board
summary: Fresh agent architecture, goal, tool, failure, memory, permission, and operations cases requiring state-machine design and evidence-based tradeoffs. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish predefined workflows from model-directed agents and choose the simpler sufficient architecture.
State invariants that must hold before and after every loop iteration.
Revise goals explicitly when new evidence changes scope or feasibility.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

from dataclasses import dataclass

# Add explicit state, stop, recovery, and evidence increments below.

steps.title: Plan the cumulative evidence run
steps.instruction: Order the Workflow Agent evidence cycle for this exam task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Workflow Agent assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.
